literal_completion_definition: Literal v7.1.1 operational completion means every v7.1.1 target area is either implemented with scoped repo-real receipts, explicitly classified as future/non-goal with claim boundary, or blocked with a documented reason. It means local validators, structural tests, coverage/gap compiler, acceptance harness, candidate-only boundaries, app-owned apply/state/external-send boundaries, QIRC/Semantic Bus boundaries, ModelWorkPacket boundaries, Final Gate boundaries, SDK bridge boundaries, Thor/Handoff advisory boundaries, and small-model-power evaluation surfaces are all represented by evidence. It does not mean production readiness, release certification, security certification, target host proof, QIRC server runtime proof, live model inference proof, model quality proof, or measured small-model improvement unless those exact receipts exist.

phases.name: App Boundary, Manifest, Binding, Universal Work
Artifact Families, Lenses, Output Contracts, Context
Candidate Artifact, Candidate DNA, Response Packet, Final Gate
Acceptance Harness, Dojo, Scoreboard, Road-to-100 Closure
